purpose: Permit a correction signal to become applied only when the official notice, its target relation, its stated scope, and the current local artifacts are independently hash-bound.
failClosedRules: Any missing or failed required check forces pending.
A DOI relation alone cannot establish that a correction has been applied.
The correction notice must explicitly identify the affected field and confirm the updated formats.
The local JATS and PDF must match both their source manifest hashes and a freshly retrieved authority or bound official-repository copy.
A hash mismatch, target mismatch, scope ambiguity, missing authority artifact, or pre-notice artifact date forces pending.
Source governance and source integrity may map the result to applied only after validating the full attestation hash and every archived evidence hash.

tripodAi2024Profile.pdfFallbackAuthority: UCL Discovery official institutional repository publisher-version copy

claimBoundary: A verified correction resolution is not a scientific-validity appraisal.
The notice-based scientific-claim-impact field reports only what the official notice indicates.
Without a pre-correction binary, the system must disclose that it did not independently diff every pre/post field.
The correction attestation does not override license, appraisal, passage, claim, or release gates.
